description: Absolute SA-DMRG-CASSCF build and analytic-response wall times for the linear-polyene series (state-0 FCI-free gradient). Values match the Supporting Information wall-time table. Build/Response are wall seconds; det_dim is the M_S=0 determinant-space dimension of the active space.
settings: native MPS-Krylov analytic gradient, no determinant conversion; per-system bond dimension, sweep schedule, and response tolerance as tabulated in the SI
